prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.7 kg; Height 172.8 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 9.8%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 262mg/dL; 3 months ago 279mg/dL; current 227mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.7kg; 9 months ago 66.1kg; 6 months ago 62.2kg; 3 months ago 62.1kg; current 62.7kg), Height (12 months ago 172.8cm; 9 months ago 172.8cm; 6 months ago 172.8cm; 3 months ago 172.8cm; current 172.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 107U/L; 9 months ago 113U/L; 6 months ago 108U/L; 3 months ago 116U/L; current 113U/L), AST (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 265mg/g; 9 months ago 310mg/g; 6 months ago 349mg/g; 3 months ago 359mg/g; current 446mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 110mg/dL; 9 months ago 126mg/dL; 6 months ago 110mg/dL; 3 months ago 105mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.00 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
